problem: Healthcare systems face increasing pressure to improve care team performance and efficiency. Cardiac monitoring solutions often lack seamless EMR integration, actionable informatics, and intuitive design, leading to workflow inefficiencies and suboptimal patient care.
solution: Spacelabs Healthcare provides diagnostic cardiology solutions including resting ECG systems (CardioExpress), patient monitoring, and anesthesia delivery. Their TeamUp strategies, Clinical Informatics for situation awareness, Runway architecture for EMR integration, and intuitive patient measurement devices help accelerate care team performance through smarter operational strategies and easier integration with existing hospital systems.
